content:
[S1]: After many years of trying, I finally discovered how to live forever.  
[READER]: Wow, living forever sounds amazing! I wonder what that would be like. I want to know what happens next.  

[S2]: Just as I was celebrating, a mysterious figure appeared in front of me—it was Death!  
[READER]: Whoa, Death showed up? That sounds a little scary but also exciting. I hope Death isn’t mean.  

[S3]: Death didn’t look scary at all; instead, he smiled and handed me a shiny business card.  
[READER]: Oh, that’s funny! Death smiling and giving a card? I want to see what’s on the card!  

[S4]: “When you realize living forever sucks,” Death said, “call this number—I’ve got a job offer for you.”  
[READER]: That’s weird! Living forever might be boring? I didn’t think of that. What kind of job does Death want to give?  

[S5]: I took the card, feeling curious but also a little nervous about what the job could be.  
[READER]: I feel curious too! I want to find out what happens if they call the number.  

[S6]: Days passed, and I started noticing that living forever meant watching everyone I loved grow old and leave.  
[READER]: That sounds sad. I didn’t think about being lonely forever. I wonder if the story will get happier.  

[S7]: Finally, I decided to call the number on the card, hoping for a new adventure.  
[READER]: Yes! I want to know what kind of adventure Death has for them!  

[S8]: Death answered with a wink and said, “Welcome to your new job as my apprentice—helping others understand life and death.”  
[READER]: That’s so cool! Helping people sounds like an important job. I’m glad the story ended with something exciting!
